center.name: 刚果河
center.summary: 刚果河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括斑翡翠、Carmelite sunbird、Congo sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Liberia as well as the lower Congo River and coastal areas of western and central Africa down to central Angola

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Known from the Republic of Congo and the Democratic Republic of the Congo, where it occurs in riverine forests along the banks of the middle Congo River and its tributaries

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species occurs in Sub-Saharan Africa except in dense forests (especially near the Congo River), the Horn of Africa, the Namib Desert and South Africa
